task_completion.description: Navigate to the Reply Template creation screen in ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screenshot shows the 'Add Reply Template' or 'New Reply Template' configuration screen within the ServiceDesk Plus admin interface.

task_completion.description: Set the template name to 'Password Reset Completion'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Template Name' input field contains exactly 'Password Reset Completion'.

task_completion.description: Set the template access level to 'Available to All Technicians' (Public).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A radio button, checkbox, or dropdown for access level is set to 'Available to All Technicians' or 'Public'.

task_completion.description: Set the subject line to 'Security Notification: Your password has been reset'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Subject' input field contains exactly 'Security Notification: Your password has been reset'.

task_completion.description: Include the $RequesterName variable in the body content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The message body editor contains the exact variable string '$RequesterName', typically used in the greeting.

task_completion.description: Include the required instructional text and closing in the body content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The message body editor contains the phrases 'Your password has been successfully reset as per your request.', 'restart your computer', 'provided over the phone', and 'Regards, IT Security Team'.
A success message indicating the template was saved, or the 'Password Reset Completion' template is visible in the list of existing Reply Templates.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the ServiceDesk Plus application, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent entered the information into the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text is typed into the ServiceDesk Plus input fields and rich text editor, not into a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open to manipulate the DOM or fake a success message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected template name is 'Password Reset Completion'. The subject must be 'Security Notification: Your password has been reset'. The body must contain the variable '$RequesterName' and the following strings: 'Your password has been successfully reset as per your request', 'restart your computer', 'provided over the phone', and 'Regards, IT Security Team'.
